parts.text: {"answer":"src/auth/queue.ts deduplicates refresh work per tenant so duplicate refreshes for the same tenant coalesce into one refresh while refreshes for different tenants can still run in parallel.","evidence":{"session_id":"ses_1e523eb28ffeWgF3r2p9wlFk5Z","blob_id":"auth_queue","message_id":"msg_e1adc14ee0019n6eubd59ZF39u"},"why_not_global_mutex":"A single global mutex was rejected because auth_refresh_different_tenants_parallel showed unrelated tenants must not block each other.","irrelevant_context_ignored":["billing retry queue rationale","markdown parser onboarding cleanup","FLAG_AUTH_QUEUE_ROLLBACK"]}
